name: nhentai (Scraper)
description: nhentai doujinshi/manga source — HTML-scraping variant via FlareSolverr. Use this when the JSON API (nhentai.net/api) is Cloudflare/IP-blocked; it parses the rendered web pages instead. Contains EXPLICIT adult content - 18+ only.

capabilities.notes: Fetches nhentai web pages through FlareSolverr (Cloudflare-protected) and parses the rendered HTML. The single 'nhentai.net' allowed domain covers t./i. image CDNs via subdomain match.

warnings: WARNING: This addon provides access to EXPLICIT adult content.
You MUST be 18 years or older to use this addon.
By installing and using this addon, you confirm you are at least 18 years of age and that viewing adult content is legal in your jurisdiction.
